title: Ask a grounded chat question and revisit the thread history
description: This verifies that a user can ask a course-grounded question, see cited answer content and quota information, and reopen the saved thread later.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Send a question about the selected course
Verify a cited answer is displayed
Verify the remaining quota is displayed

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the correct role-specific area
